title: Senior Financial Analyst - Cholamandalam Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Cholamandalam Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Cholamandalam Finance in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cholamandalam Finance:
Cholamandalam Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cholamandalam Finance!
